PROOF OF SERVICE BY PERSONAL DELIVERY OF OBJECTION TO DECLARATION OF EXPERT IN OPPOSITION TO MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION FILED BY DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO., ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS WALGREENS

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO.'S, ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS WALGREENS MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. THERE EXISTS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT REGARDING WHETHER MR. RE IS A MANAGING AGENT THAT RATIFIED THE EMPLOYEES CONDUCT. MR. RE IS THE LOSS PREVENTION MANAGER FOR 38 OF DEFENDANT'S SF STORES. (DAVID RE DEPO, 5:21-23; 23:3-6). DEFENDANT'S OFFICIAL SHOPLIFTING POLICY STATES "NO EMPLOYEE IS ALLOWED TO PHYSICALLY TOUCH SUSPECTED SHOPLIFTERS." MR. RE REVIEWED THE VIDEO OF THE ARREST AND DID NOT THINK THAT THE ARREST WAS UNREASONABLE OR EXCESSIVE. (RE DEPO, 61:3-64:22). THE EMPLOYEES VIOLATED DEFENDANT'S NO TOUCH POLICY. (RE DEPO, 56:2-8; 65:10-12). MR. RE DID NOT INVESTIGATE THE INCIDENT AND TO HIS KNOWLEDGE, DEFENDANT NEVER REPRIMANDED THE EMPLOYEES. (RE DEPO, 88:14-19). DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO THE RE DEPOSITION (OBJECTIONS 8-13) ARE OVERRULED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO., ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS WALGREENS' MOTION TO SUBMIT TARDY SUPPLEMENTAL EXPERT DISCLOSURE IS GRANTED. THE EXPERT SHALL BE MADE IMMEDIATELY AVAILABLE FOR DEPOSITION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
